title: RedPojav
description: Modpack for players who played on phone with PojavLauncher
body:
This is a modpack tailored for RP servers, featuring mods like EmoteCraft, PlasmoVoice, and various performance-enhancing mods. You have the option to install the essential plugins on your server and experiment with this setup, as it can enhance your server's performance! This setup is a superb choice for casual players as well as those on private servers.
# PlasmoVoice
One of the best mods for voice chat directly in the game
# EmoteCraft
Use funny and amusing emotions in the game
# Xaero world/minimap
Use the map to see mobs, players, and create points to make it convenient to get to the meeting place with friends!
# Optimization mods
Our modpack will run even on weak PCs and even on phones via Pojavlauncher
# Cit Resewn, ETF and EMF
These mods allow you to use CIT resourcepacks
# AlinPerspective (Analog of PerspectiveModRedux)
Use the F4 key to rotate the camera 360 from third person
# Litematica
Build buildings according to the scheme and surprise your friends!
# Ok Zoomer (analog Zoomify)
Zoom in on your screen to see buildings in the distance
